personal.name: Rajat Savdekar
personal.note: Eligible for up to 3 years of STEM OPT starting May 2026; no immediate sponsorship required

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering

bullets.text: Guided 2 international teams of 15+ students through Python, Git, and RESTful API development on Raspberry Pi robotics hardware across a 4-week multidisciplinary rotation, with all teams successfully delivering functional prototypes on schedule.
bullets.latex: Guided 2 international teams of 15+ students through \textbf{Python}, \textbf{Git}, and \textbf{RESTful API} development on Raspberry Pi robotics hardware across a 4-week multidisciplinary rotation, with all teams successfully delivering functional prototypes on schedule.

bullets.text: Built a JavaScript, HTML, and CSS web-based procurement platform backed by a RESTful API, migrating 150 daily users from manual logs to a digital system with 99.9% uptime across complex inventory transactions.
bullets.latex: Built a \textbf{JavaScript}, \textbf{HTML}, and \textbf{CSS} web-based procurement platform backed by a RESTful API, migrating 150 daily users from manual logs to a digital system with 99.9\% uptime across complex inventory transactions.

bullets.text: Decomposed a legacy monolith into Python microservices and redesigned the MySQL schema, cutting average query time by 40% on high-frequency supply chain lookups.
bullets.latex: Decomposed a legacy monolith into \textbf{Python} microservices and redesigned the \textbf{MySQL} schema, cutting average query time by 40\% on high-frequency supply chain lookups.

bullets.text: Introduced Docker-based CI/CD pipelines with Git-managed releases, reducing deployment cycle time by 30% and eliminating manual steps that previously caused production rollbacks.
bullets.latex: Introduced \textbf{Docker}-based \textbf{CI/CD} pipelines with \textbf{Git}-managed releases, reducing deployment cycle time by 30\% and eliminating manual steps that previously caused production rollbacks.

bullets.text: Designed and built a real-time collaborative code editor in React and Node.js, implementing Yjs CRDTs over WebSockets to support conflict-free concurrent edits across 50+ simultaneous clients with sub-100ms sync latency.
bullets.latex: Designed and built a real-time collaborative code editor in \textbf{React} and \textbf{Node.js}, implementing Yjs CRDTs over \textbf{WebSockets} to support conflict-free concurrent edits across 50+ simultaneous clients with sub-100ms sync latency.

bullets.text: Integrated OpenAI Whisper via a Python microservice for asynchronous speech transcription, synchronizing a three-timeline event log (code ops, audio, captions) anchored to a shared session timestamp, enabling interviewers to replay complete sessions with synchronized audio and transcript.
bullets.latex: Integrated OpenAI Whisper via a \textbf{Python} microservice for asynchronous speech transcription, synchronizing a three-timeline event log (code ops, audio, captions) anchored to a shared session timestamp, enabling interviewers to replay complete sessions with synchronized audio and transcript.

bullets.text: Deployed full-stack to Vercel and a custom Linux Caddy server on DigitalOcean, with a MongoDB event-sourced op log powering continuous session playback and audit history.
bullets.latex: Deployed full-stack to Vercel and a custom \textbf{Linux} Caddy server on DigitalOcean, with a \textbf{MongoDB} event-sourced op log powering continuous session playback and audit history.

projects.name: DevStack – Open Source Developer Infrastructure Platform

bullets.text: Built a self-hostable developer infrastructure platform – feature flags, workflow orchestration, observability, auth, event analytics, and error tracking – using Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Docker, enabling any team to self-host the full platform via a single CI/CD-integrated Docker Compose command.
bullets.latex: Built a self-hostable developer infrastructure platform -- feature flags, workflow orchestration, observability, auth, event analytics, and error tracking -- using \textbf{Next.js}, \textbf{Node.js}, \textbf{PostgreSQL}, and \textbf{Docker}, enabling any team to self-host the full platform via a single \textbf{CI/CD}-integrated Docker Compose command.

bullets.text: Engineered a durable workflow execution engine using an event-sourced PostgreSQL schema and a TypeScript deterministic replay engine, re-executing workflow functions from activity history on server restart to resume at the exact point of failure without re-triggering completed side effects.
bullets.latex: Engineered a durable workflow execution engine using an event-sourced PostgreSQL schema and a \textbf{TypeScript} deterministic replay engine, re-executing workflow functions from activity history on server restart to resume at the exact point of failure without re-triggering completed side effects.

bullets.text: Designed a feature flag targeting rules engine with sub-5ms evaluation via a Redis cache and real-time WebSocket push propagation, exposing all platform services through a GraphQL federation gateway behind a single typed schema.
bullets.latex: Designed a feature flag targeting rules engine with sub-5ms evaluation via a \textbf{Redis} cache and real-time \textbf{WebSocket} push propagation, exposing all platform services through a \textbf{GraphQL} federation gateway behind a single typed schema.

bullets.text: Secured the platform with a shared JWT auth layer using RS256 signing and refresh token rotation, implementing role-based access control across all six services via a centralized REST API identity service backed by a normalized SQL schema, allowing teams to manage all platform permissions under a single identity.
bullets.latex: Secured the platform with a shared \textbf{JWT} auth layer using RS256 signing and refresh token rotation, implementing role-based access control across all six services via a centralized \textbf{REST API} identity service backed by a normalized \textbf{SQL} schema, allowing teams to manage all platform permissions under a single identity.

bullets.text: Built a Python RAG pipeline and RESTful API backed by AWS and MongoDB, indexing 10,000+ celestial bodies to ground an LLM with real-time orbital facts and eliminate hallucination on astronomical queries.
bullets.latex: Built a \textbf{Python} RAG pipeline and \textbf{RESTful API} backed by \textbf{AWS} and \textbf{MongoDB}, indexing 10,000+ celestial bodies to ground an LLM with real-time orbital facts and eliminate hallucination on astronomical queries.

bullets.text: Delivered on-device AI via Whisper and C# scripting on the Meta Quest 3 client, achieving local speech-to-text inference under 500ms to remove network dependency during natural language interactions.
bullets.latex: Delivered on-device \textbf{AI} via Whisper and \textbf{C\#} scripting on the Meta Quest 3 client, achieving local speech-to-text inference under 500ms to remove network dependency during natural language interactions.

bullets.text: Maintained 90 FPS for 6DoF planetary models by optimizing CI/CD-deployed Unity rendering pipelines, meeting the headset's minimum frame rate requirement for comfortable 6DoF movement without motion sickness.
bullets.latex: Maintained 90 FPS for 6DoF planetary models by optimizing \textbf{CI/CD}-deployed Unity rendering pipelines, meeting the headset's minimum frame rate requirement for comfortable 6DoF movement without motion sickness.

bullets.text: Implemented a graph-based debt simplification algorithm to consolidate N-party settlements into the minimum transaction set, reducing average settlement steps by 60% versus a naive per-pair approach.
bullets.latex: Implemented a graph-based debt simplification algorithm to consolidate N-party settlements into the minimum transaction set, reducing average settlement steps by 60\% versus a naive per-pair approach.

bullets.text: Designed a modular RESTful API with object-oriented Node.js and optimized NoSQL (MongoDB) schemas to handle concurrent multi-user financial state without race conditions.
bullets.latex: Designed a modular \textbf{RESTful API} with object-oriented \textbf{Node.js} and optimized \textbf{NoSQL} (MongoDB) schemas to handle concurrent multi-user financial state without race conditions.

bullets.text: Deployed full-stack to a Linux Caddy server on DigitalOcean, sustaining sub-200ms transaction resolution under concurrent load with no additional infrastructure cost as user count scaled.
bullets.latex: Deployed full-stack to a \textbf{Linux} Caddy server on DigitalOcean, sustaining sub-200ms transaction resolution under concurrent load with no additional infrastructure cost as user count scaled.
